Jh jesUnz dqekj, vf[ky Hkkjrh; VsªM ;wfu;u dkaxzsl [la-oh- 20012/1/2013-,l-,l-II] vkj- ds- xqIrk] la;qDr lfpo, fVIi.k:— dsanzh; U;klh cksMZ ds iquZxBu lEcU/kh ewy vf/klwpuk Hkkjr ds jkti=, Hkkx II, [kaM 3, mi-[kaM (ii) esa fnukad 23 ebZ, 2013 ds dk.vk. 1330(v) n~okjk izdkf’kr dh xbZ Fkh vkSj vafre ckj fnukad 11 vxLr, 2017 ds dk.vk. 2568 (v) n~okjk la’kksf/kr dh xbZ FkhA MINISTRY OF LABOUR AND EMPLOYMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 22nd November, 2017 S.O. 3705(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 5A of the Employees’ Provident Funds and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1952 (19 of 1952), the Central Government hereby reconstitutes the Central Board of Trustees (Employees’ Provident Fund) and makes the following -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] amendment in this Ministry’s Notification published in the Gazette of India having No. S.O. 1330 (E) dated 23rd May, 2013. 2. In the said Notification the following entry shall be substituted at Sl. No. 42, namely.- MEMBERS (e) Representatives of Employees under clause (e) of sub-section (1) of Section 5A. 42. Shri Ramendra Kumar, All India Trade Union Congress. [No.V-20012/1/2013-SS.II] R. K. GUPTA, Jt. Secy. Note:— The principal notification reconstituting the Central Board of Trustees was published in the Gazette of India, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (ii), vide S.O. 1330(E) dated the 23rd May, 2013 and last amended vide S.O. 2568(E) dated the 11th August, 2017. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
